name: us-equity-ic-rigor
description: Layer PM-grade IC-deliverable rigor on top of us-equity-research for institutional buy-side workflows on US-listed equities (NYSE/Nasdaq/AMEX/OTC tickers, plus ADRs via 20-F/6-K). Use whenever the user wants an IC memo, IC pre-read, IC debate script, LP letter, earnings prep, earnings flash, or kill memo, OR is iterating an existing memo through PM red-team review cycles ('score this memo', 'PM red-team this', 'find what is broken', 'round N', 'push from 8.x to 9.x'). Also use when the user references the S1-S5 source stratification, five-scenario probabilistic framework (strong_bear/bear/base/bull/strong_bull), three-method reconcile (DCF / Comps / multi-multiple bear / SOTP), GM taxonomy (T1 consolidated / T2 segment / T3 sub-segment / T4 modeled / T5 marginal), bear EPS bridge, what-would-reverse triggers with numerical denominators, A0 tail mapping, anchor sensitivity, Barra factor exposure, capacity / days-to-exit at 10-20-30% ADV participation, position sizing across five mandate types (long-only LC, long-only SMID, L/S HF, sector specialty, pair-trade), or any of the 20 verification gates G1-G20 (G15 consensus variance, G16 bank discipline, G17 revision velocity added v0.2.0; G18 quant cross-doc consistency, G19 provenance manifest, G20 view defensibility added v0.3.0). Soft dependency on companion plugin us-equity-research for upstream phase output. Optional Excel DCF/comps delegation via claude-for-financial-services/financial-analysis. Optional polished 30-50pg DOCX delegation via claude-for-financial-services/equity-research initiating-coverage Task 5.
